installCommand: if cd ../frontend 2>/dev/null; then npm install; elif cd frontend 2>/dev/null; then npm install; else echo 'frontend not found' && exit 1; fi
buildCommand: if cd ../frontend 2>/dev/null; then npm run build; elif cd frontend 2>/dev/null; then npm run build; else echo 'frontend not found' && exit 1; fi
devCommand: if cd ../frontend 2>/dev/null; then npm run dev; elif cd frontend 2>/dev/null; then npm run dev; else echo 'frontend not found' && exit 1; fi
